title: Unable to push podman images to docker private registry
body:
Hello,

I'm unable to push podman image to docker registry where we can push docker images to same registry. please suggest

podman login private-registry.docker.com
Username: username
Password:
Login Succeeded!


podman push private-registry.docker.com/app-pilot-service/app-monolithic:latest
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob 8373ec5bddac done
Copying blob d1a7a501a93f done
Copying blob d5ead368c960 skipped: already exists
Copying blob 4fe15f8d0ae6 skipped: already exists
Copying config 78bffe03e1 done
Writing manifest to image destination

Error: Error copying image to the remote destination: Error writing manifest: Error uploading manifest latest to private-registry.docker.com/app-pilot-service/app-monolithic: received unexpected HTTP status: 500 Internal Server Error

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out!

> status: 500 Internal Server Error

That indicates an internal error on the server. There is not much Podman can do. I suggest to have a look at the logs of the server.

Please make sure to fill out the entire issue template (i.e., `podman info` output etc) next time.

Thanks, but same I can able to push images using docker push

bash-4.2$ podman info
host:
  BuildahVersion: 1.9.0
  Conmon:
    package: podman-1.4.4-4.0.1.el7.x86_64
    path: /usr/libexec/podman/conmon

  MemFree: 774393856
  MemTotal: 8082882560

    path: /usr/bin/runc

      runc version 1.0.0-rc5+dev
      commit: 4bb1fe4ace1a32d3676bb98f5d3b6a4e32bf6c58

  SwapTotal: 5364510720

  cpus: 5
  hostname: **********

  blocked: null

  - private-registry.docker.com

store:

  ContainerStore:
    number: 2
  GraphDriverName: vfs
  GraphOptions: null
  GraphRoot: /var/lib/containers/.local/share/containers/storage
  GraphStatus: {}
  ImageStore:
    number: 35
  RunRoot: /run/user/1004
  VolumePath: /var/lib/containers/.local/share/containers/storage/volumes
  
  
  
  bash-4.2$ podman version
Version:            1.4.4
RemoteAPI Version:  1
Go Version:         go1.12.9
OS/Arch:            linux/amd64

> Version: 1.4.4

That is a very old version. Can you update to a newer version? CentOS 7 ships Podman v1.6.4.
